prompt: What is the date of last sale for the business entity that is deregistering? This date will serve as the effective date on all applications to deregister your business entity and close your sales tax account. No tax should be collected by the business entity after this date and no transactions occurring after this date should be included in your final return.
help_text: The exact Close Out/De-registration Date provided below will be used on ALL the de-registration requests sent to ALL the jurisdictions within the scope of this project.

prompt: What is the reason your business entity is deregistering in these jurisdictions?
Is the acquirer or surviving business entity already registered and collecting sales and use tax under a new entity?
warning_texts: If the acquirer or surviving business entity is not registered and collecting sales and use tax prior to the deregistration effective date, a sales tax liability may be incurred. The acquirer or surviving business entity will be responsible for paying this liability at its own expense.

prompt: Was the acquirer or surviving business entity registered for sales tax registration before your date of last sale you provided?
